Class LoadBalancerCacheProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.loadbalancer.cache.LoadBalancerCacheProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.loadbalancer.cache") public class LoadBalancerCacheProperties extends Object
Spring Cloud LoadBalancer cache properties.
Since:
2.2.0
Author:
Olga Maciaszek-Sharma
